sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER, interval_value INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, interval_value) VALUES (1, to_months(3));
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_value = interval_value + to_months(2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, interval_value FROM test_intervals WHERE interval_value > to_months(1);
SELECT id, interval_value + to_months(1) AS extended_interval FROM test_intervals;
